name: agent-ui
description: Desktop pet overlay for local Hermes sessions

scripts.dist:mac:bootstrap: npm run dist:mac:connector:bootstrap && npm run dist:mac:standalone:bootstrap
scripts.dist:mac:connector:bootstrap: node scripts/assert-mac-release-env.js bootstrap connector && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config packaging/electron-builder.connector.bootstrap.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:standalone:bootstrap: node scripts/assert-mac-release-env.js bootstrap standalone && npm run bundle:hermes && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --config packaging/electron-builder.standalone.bootstrap.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:developer-id: npm run dist:mac:connector:developer-id && npm run dist:mac:standalone:developer-id
scripts.dist:mac:connector:developer-id: node scripts/assert-mac-release-env.js developer-id connector && npm run build && electron-builder --config packaging/electron-builder.connector.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:standalone:developer-id: node scripts/assert-mac-release-env.js developer-id standalone && npm run bundle:hermes && npm run build && electron-builder --config packaging/electron-builder.standalone.cjs --mac dmg zip --publish never

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: agent-UI uses the microphone to capture voice input for prompts.
